summary: Critical: actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to SHA (requires full 40-char hash + version comment per requirements). run-tests.ps1 sets ErrorActionPreference 'Continue'—should be 'Stop' to catch failures. Code duplication: Import-JUnitXml/Import-JsonTestResults (lines 25-118) should be merged. Test assertions are brittle (hard-coded markdown patterns break on format changes). Good structure and documentation, but unfixable brittleness and missing action pinning prevent shipping.
